modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Common questions about leave and timesheet issues.

full_description_text:  
So, I’ve been running into some questions about leave and timesheets. Like, what do I do if I can’t submit my time? Or, what happens if I take leave but it doesn’t show up right? It’s kinda confusing, and I just want to make sure I’m doing everything right.
short_description: Common questions about leave and timesheet issues.
description: So, I’ve been running into some questions about leave and timesheets. Like, what do I do if I can’t submit my time? Or, what happens if I take leave but it doesn’t show up right? It’s kinda confusing, and I just want to make sure I’m doing everything right.
